name: add-tool-variant-prompt
task: I need a new tool for fetching options chain data. The tool should be called get_options_chain, accept a ticker and optional expiration date, and use the pricing domain client. Wire it up end to end.
assertions: A tool definition named 'get_options_chain' is added in tool-defs.ts with both 'ticker' (required) and 'expiration_date' (optional) parameters
The tool is mapped to the 'pricing' domain in TOOL_DOMAIN_MAP
An else-if dispatch branch for 'get_options_chain' is added in executeTool() in tool-registry.ts
The tool description says WHEN to use the tool (e.g., 'Use for options pricing, open interest, or implied volatility questions') not just what it returns
The result is serialized with JSON.stringify(data, bigintReplacer) in the tool-registry.ts dispatch
